reviews.comment:
La nafta es ypf, medio pelo pero... Los playeros son los más buena onda de todas las estaciones de cipo

(Translated by Google)
The gas is YPF, so-so but... The attendants are the friendliest of all the stations in Cipolletti

reviews.comment:
Buenas hamburguesas. Las papas, maso. Precios normales atención buena. Parking bueno. Nafta nose porque no cargue. Maquina presión de aire neumáticos, muy muy buena. Baños muy limpios y hasta con jabón liquido. Seguro volveré.

(Translated by Google)
Good burgers. The fries were so-so. Normal prices, good service. Good parking. I don't know about gas because I didn't fill up. The tire pressure machine was very, very good. Very clean bathrooms, even with liquid soap. I'll definitely be back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURleHVUaFpBEAE
